title: Definitely Vanilla+
description: A bunch of vanilla+ mods to enhance minecraft, specially in the progression side of things
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e525eeb7f6a30845535126941661214b8f524f3.png)

Definitely Vanilla + is (obviously) a vanilla+ mod that adds various little things to make minecraft better, withought making it too flooded with new features and itens, and if you still find it difficult, we have at the right side of the inventory the mod JEI to help in your journey.

The most notable mods are:
1. **Tectonic:** changes the world generation
2. **Better nether & end:** overhalls the entire nether and end dimensions to make it better
3. **World host, Simple Voice Chat, etc,:** enhances the multiplayer experience by making incredibly easy to start a multiplayer world and tweaks a bit to make multiplayer better
4. **Ambient Sound, Sound Physics Remastered etc.:** makes Minecraft more immersive with more sounds and echo to the caves!
5. **Sodium, Indium, Entityculling, etc.:** Optimize the game so it doesn't lag as much as it would be
6. **Yung's better mods:** adds new, but simple and enhances a lot of vannila structures 
7. **Deeper & darker & Aether:** Adds brand new dimentions to the game
